name: Synthetic Biology Design Cost
description: Approximate cost to design and build a functional synthetic biological pathway or simple organism. Captures declining costs of DNA synthesis, computational design tools, and automated screening.

data_points.source: J. Craig Venter Institute — Mycoplasma genitalium synthesis project costs; early whole-genome synthesis attempts
JCVI — Synthia (Mycoplasma mycoides JCVI-syn1.0) complete synthetic genome, ~$40M total project
Ginkgo Bioworks / Amyris — cost to engineer a novel metabolic pathway for commercial production declining with automated foundries
Ginkgo Bioworks / Zymergen — automated strain engineering; DNA synthesis costs falling to ~$0.10/bp
Ginkgo Bioworks / Twist Bioscience — platform approach reducing per-pathway cost; synthesis at $0.07/bp
Industry estimates — AI-guided design (Ginkgo, Arzeda) + cheap synthesis reducing iteration costs dramatically
Ginkgo Bioworks platform pricing / Arzeda / Tierra Biosciences — AI protein design + $0.02/bp synthesis enabling rapid iteration (approx)
